title: Cryptool gets the verified badge on X
content_html:
@cryptool_io is now a verified X account.

The badge matters for one reason: it confirms which channels are actually the Cryptool team. Official communication only ever comes through the verified X account, the official Telegram group, and email addresses on the cryptool.io domain.

If anyone reaches out claiming to be from Cryptool through a different handle or domain, treat it as a scam and report it.
author: Cryptool
